V-M-029.description: Verify that the complete KrotPN → KrotPN rebranding produces zero breakage across all deploy surfaces, container names, scripts, frontend UI, and live operations.

scenario-1.NAME: docker compose up -d (clean)
scenario-1.expected: All 6 containers start with new names: krotpn-db, krotpn-redis, krotpn-backend, krotpn-frontend, krotpn-admin, krotpn-nginx. All show "healthy" status. Zero references to "krotpn-" in container names.

scenario-2.NAME: deploy-all.sh on fresh VPS
scenario-2.expected: Script completes without errors. All systemd units created with krotpn-* names. .env written with krotpn defaults. Containers running. No references to /opt/KrotPN in active paths (backward-compat symlink may exist but is not used by scripts).

scenario-3.NAME: backend health endpoint
scenario-3.expected: HTTP 200 OK with JSON containing "app_name": "KrotPN". No references to "KrotPN" in response headers or body.

scenario-4.NAME: VPN client connects

steps.step: Import into AmneziaWG client and connect

scenario-4.expected: AmneziaWG connects successfully. Config filename starts with "krotpn-". Tunnel interface comes up. Ping to 10.10.0.1 (AWG gateway) succeeds.

scenario-5.NAME: split-tunneling works (myip.ru test)

steps.step: curl https://google.com (should go direct — RU IP)

scenario-5.expected: myip.ru shows RU IP address for RU sites. Split-tunneling routing table uses krotpn-* systemd units. ipset ru_ips populated. No routing leaks.

scenario-6.NAME: admin panel loads over HTTPS
scenario-6.expected: Admin panel loads. Login page shows "KrotPN Control Plane" (not "KrotPN"). Sidebar displays "KrotPN". Admin login succeeds with credentials from .env.

scenario-7.NAME: zero remaining KrotPN references (static check)

steps.step: grep -rni "krotpn" --include='*.py' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.yml' --include='*.sh' --include='*.json' --include='*.toml' --include='*.html' backend/ frontend/ frontend-admin/ deploy/ nginx/ docs/ . | grep -v 'archive/' | grep -v 'CHANGELOG.md' | grep -v 'package-lock.json'

scenario-7.expected: Zero matches in source files. Archive and CHANGELOG entries are excluded intentionally as they are historical records.
scenario-7.command: grep -rni "krotpn" --include='*.py' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.yml' --include='*.sh' --include='*.json' --include='*.toml' --include='*.html' backend/ frontend/ frontend-admin/ deploy/ nginx/ docs/ . 2>/dev/null | grep -vc 'archive\|CHANGELOG\|package-lock' || echo "ZERO_REMAINING"

scenario-8.NAME: systemd units renamed
scenario-8.expected: Units krotpn-routing.service, krotpn-ru-ips.timer, krotpn-ru-ips.service, krotpn-sync-awg0.service, krotpn-sync-awg0.path all exist and are enabled. Old krotpn-* units are disabled/removed.

module-checks.check: All deploy scripts pass syntax: bash -n deploy/*.sh install.sh
Frontend builds: cd frontend && npm run build
Admin frontend builds: cd frontend-admin && npm run build
Backend config loads: cd backend && python -c "from app.core.config import settings; assert settings.app_name == 'KrotPN'"

rollback-plan.step: Re-enable old systemd units: systemctl enable/start krotpn-*
